cleaned_prompt:
{ "image_prompt": "Create a high-quality image featuring a stunning mirror selfie of a woman at least 20 years old with an extreme hourglass figure. She is seated looking over her shoulder in a casual indoor setting. Exact reference pose: seated position, turned to look over her shoulder, strong arched back pushing out her backside, seductive over-the-shoulder gaze. Strong sexual body emphasis: massive round plump juicy ass taking center focus, deep side cleavage, tiny cinched waist, wide hips, thick thighs, dramatic S-curve posture, skin-tight fabric clinging tightly to her curves. Outfit: wearing a vibrant orange tank top and matching shorts that accentuate her figure. Natural daylight, realistic fabric cling, consistent body proportions and pose, vertical smartphone aesthetic.", "notes": "Please ensure the image captures the essence of the reference image, including the mirror selfie context with the bathroom counter or mirror edge visible in the foreground."
}

promptFields.klingMotionPrompt: Animate each cropped panel as its own short vertical motion clip. Keep the selected panel framing, room, outfit feel, camera angle, lighting, and supplied start-image composition stable. Apply this motion pattern: reference-matched simple steady movement with full-frame composition.
promptFields.notes: Live Local VLM (Florence-2 + Ollama) direct Higgsfield prompt.

analysis.motion_prompt_hint: reference-matched simple steady movement with full-frame composition
